justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for "next week Tuesday at 14 o'clock" as June 9th at 14:00.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the booking in two turns, confirming the details and then booking the appointment without any unnecessary questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly confirming and booking the appointment as requested.
